message:
fix(mail): include hooked agents in recipient validation

Agent beads with status "hooked" are active (working on something) but
were filtered out by queryAgentsInDir, making them unaddressable via
gt mail send. This caused witnesses to fail escalating to the deacon
and fall back to pinging the mayor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
